input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Hoplite documentation examples often use YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON resource files, but those formats require optional hoplite parser modules; generated tests should avoid those formats unless intentionally adding parser-module coverage. Java .properties and programmatic property sources are built into hoplite-core.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is required: hoplite-core 3.0.0.RC1 resolves to normal Kotlin/kotlin-reflect/coroutines transitive dependencies and meaningful coverage is reachable through core APIs such as ConfigLoaderBuilder, MapPropertySource, built-in properties parsing, decoders, preprocessors, and parameter mapping without Docker, extra services, or required environment/system properties.
